privileged_info_summary: The task creates incident bookmarks using Nx Witness VMS, a real video management system from Network Optix running on REST API v1 at https://localhost:7001. The environment creates five synthetic cameras (Parking Lot Camera, Entrance Camera, Server Room Camera, Lobby Camera, Loading Dock Camera) via the testcamera tool. The metadata specifies three bookmarks the agent must create: (1) 'Suspect Entry' on Entrance Camera at base timestamp T, duration 120 seconds, tagged 'theft/suspect/entrance'; (2) 'Suspicious Behavior in Lobby' on Lobby Camera at T+180s, duration 300 seconds, tagged 'theft/suspect/loitering'; (3) 'Suspect Vehicle Departure' on Parking Lot Camera at T+600s, duration 180 seconds, tagged 'theft/suspect/vehicle'. The incident base timestamp is generated dynamically as 30 minutes before task execution and stored in /home/ga/incident_start_time.txt. All bookmarks use the Nx Witness REST API v1 endpoint POST /rest/v1/bookmarks with fields: deviceId, name, description, startTimeMs (epoch milliseconds), durationMs, and tags array. This is synthetic data created for the task, not real-world incident data.
